title: Devon Wick Sample Box, 50 Individual Vegan Soy Wax Melts, Assorted Fragrances
features: 50 BESTSELLING SCENTS IN ONE BOX - Discover your perfect fragrance match with 50 individual wax melts, each representing one of our top-selling scents-from fruity and floral to fresh, cosy, and sweet.
TRY BEFORE YOU COMMIT - No more wasted wax! Sample a wide variety of fragrances before investing in full-sized bars-ideal for both wax melt lovers and first-time scent explorers.
THE PERFECT GIFT FOR ANY OCCASION - Beautifully packaged and brimming with variety, this sample box makes a thoughtful gift for birthdays, holidays, housewarmings, or just because.
PREMIUM, LONG-LASTING FRAGRANCE - Each melt is made with high-quality ingredients for a consistent and long-lasting scent throw-designed to fill your space with fragrance you'll adore.
HANDCRAFTED BY DEVON WICK - Proudly crafted in the UK, our wax melts offer an elevated fragrance experience you can trust-vegan, cruelty-free, and customer-loved.
description: Introducing our ULTIMATE Wax Melt Sample Box, the ultimate way to experience our top 50 selling scents! Our sample pack includes a wide variety of fragrances, ranging from sweet and fruity to fresh and floral. Each Wax Melt Sample Box contains 50 individual wax melts, providing you with a diverse and unique scent experience. Simply place a wax melt in your favourite wax warmer, and let the scent fill the room. Whether you're a wax melt addict or a newcomer to the world of scents, our ULTIMATE Wax Melt Sample Box is a must-have. Discover your new favourite fragrance without the fear of wasting money on scents that may not suit your preferences. Explore a diverse range of captivating aromas, from floral and fruity notes to cosy and comforting blends. This sample box is also the perfect gift for your loved ones. Treat someone special to an introductory journey through Devon Wick, and let them experience the joy of discovering their favourite scents. Our wax melts are made with high-quality ingredients, ensuring that each melt is long-lasting and releases a consistent scent throughout its use. Experience the magic of our top 50 selling scents with our Wax Melt Sample Pack today! Scents included: 1 x 1000 Wishes Sample 1 x Aventus Sample 1 x Baby Powder Sample 1 x Beach Water Coconut Sample 1 x Bedtime Baby Sample 1 x Belle Sample 1 x Between The Sheets Sample 1 x Black Orchid Sample 1 x Black Pomegranate Sample 1 x Blueberry Burst Sample 1 x Cherry Bakewell Sample 1 x Citrus Burst Sample 1 x Coconut Milk & Lavender Sample 1 x Unstoppable Fresh Sample 1 x Laundry Fairy Sample 1 x Lemon Sherbet Sample 1 x Lime, Basil & Mandarin Sample 1 x Martian Sample 1 x Millionaires’ Sample 1 x Opium Sample 1 x Oud Wood Sample 1 x Peony & Blush Suede Sample 1 x Rhubarb & Custard Sample 1 x Rhubarb Patch Sample 1 x Rose Wonderland Sample 1 x Savage Sample 1 x Sea Shells Sample 1 x Sleepy Dreams Sample 1 x Snow Pixie Sample 1 x Spring Awakening Sample 1 x Strawberry & Lily Sample 1 x Stress Relief Sample 1 x Tropical Explosion Sample 1 x Forgotten Cherry Sample 1 x Plum Bum Sample 1 x Janeiro Sunshine Sample 1 x Cherry Kisses & Strawberry Hearts Sample 1 x Coconutty Sample 1 x Crisp Citrus & Mint Sample 1 x Daisy Chain Sample 1 x Flowerbomb Sample 1 x Invictus Sample 1 x Lemon & Lavender Sample 1 x Marshmallow Fluff Sample 1 x Neroli Portofino Sample 1 x Pink Sands Sample 1 x Pink Tulips & White Jasmine Sample 1 x Rouge Sample 1 x Soft Bubbles Sample 1 x Summer Days Sample
